messages.content: As an AI language model, I do not have personal beliefs or opinions. I am programmed to provide accurate and informative responses to users' queries within the scope of my training data.
hii
Hello! How can I help you today?
can you help me write google ad copy?

Sure, I can help you write Google ad copy. Please provide me with some details about your business, target audience, and what you want to promote through your ads. This will help me come up with effective ad copy that resonates with your target audience and generates the desired results.

Here it is: mobile app called Aware, which helps people prevent heart attacks and strokes by tracking their blood pressure, cholesterol, and sugar levels. The app provides daily action steps for lifestyle intervention and rewards healthy behaviors. Users can also book home blood tests and get personalized recommendations based on their test results. mobile app called Aware that helps people prevent heart attacks. The app helps track important health markers like blood pressure, cholesterol, and sugar levels to minimize health risks. The app also offers personalized guidance and rewards for healthy behaviors. Users can book home blood tests and get personalized recommendations. The website includes user reviews and contact information for customer support. The app can be downloaded from the App Store or Google Play.

reward you for healthy behaviors - it's like having a personal cheerleader! And if you need to book a home blood test, we've got you covered. 
Company Name: Aware Heart
What do they do?: Digital Health app that combines health data from devices such as smart watches, lab data(tests) and gives users a holistic view and guidance regarding their health. Also enables users to book tests via the app from various labs that are present on the platform. 
What problem are they solving?: combining health data that is user generated with lab data to provide insights and medical information along with the ability to book tests

Other  companies: E commerce model
Aware: Test + Analyses + Behavioral Data
Product: 
Android and IoS mobile App
Price:
Install is free. There are some paid features and lab tests are 20% cheaper than if booked directly via the lab
Sales Channels: insurance providers
Promotional Channels: Newspaper ads, labs, insurance providers, online ads
Have they shared any historical sales information? If yes, then mention below or attach a relevant link.

They have about 800 users and daily active users are 100. The app was launched one month ago. 
Have they shared an existing brand book? If yes, then attach the link here.

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/11HmoIRXDJ7rTChPcu7383jrJ8LcfwAxN?usp=drive_link

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1jfkmspDT9J1WbFRxTJXwZgWjCiKuOdqL?usp=drive_link


Age: 30-60 
Gender: Both 
Location (mention cities/ towns): Tier 1, 2, 3 cities across India. 
Education: Undergraduate degree
Profession:  IT Professionals, business professionals, tech savvy people
Average household income: >5lpa
Top 3 media consumption channels:  Google, Linkedin, Facebook
Interests (hobbies, non-work activities, shopping behaviours, personality trait that they currently identify as):
Heightened awareness of health and fitness. They are tech savvy and love to use data and medical info to lead a healthy lifestyle. Enrolled in a gym and lead a healthy and balanced lifestyle.  Others are those who have ailments such as BP, sugar and want to improve heart health. 
Purchase/ Consumption Occasions: There are 5 value moments in the App once installation is done. 

Three types of users: Power users(Check 5-7 times per week), Core users(Check 3 times per week), Casual users(Less than 3 times per week)


Buyer Persona 1:
People who dont have any health diseases yet but are fitness freaks

Buyer Persona 2:
People who have diseases and are trying to manage their diseases

Buyer Persona 3:

Based on the information you provided, here are some ad copy ideas for your mobile app called Aware:

1. Are you aware of your heart health? Use Aware Heart, the digital app that combines health data and lab results to help you prevent heart attacks and strokes. Download now from the App Store or Google Play.

2. Keep your heart healthy with Aware Heart, the mobile app that tracks your blood pressure, cholesterol, and sugar levels to minimize health risks. Get personalized guidance and rewards for healthy behaviors. Try it today!

3. Don't wait for a heart attack or stroke to take action. Use Aware Heart, the mobile app that empowers you to take control of your heart health. Book home blood tests and get personalized recommendations based on your test results. Download now!

4. Want to stay healthy and fit? Let Aware Heart be your personal cheerleader! Our digital health app combines user-generated data and lab results to provide insights and medical information tailored to your needs. Plus, get 20% cheaper lab tests when you book through the app. Try it today!

5. Make heart health a priority with Aware Heart, the mobile app that helps you prevent heart attacks and strokes. Our app integrates health data from smart watches and lab tests, and provides daily action steps for lifestyle intervention. Join 800+ users who already use and love it!

6. Stay healthy and active with Aware Heart, the mobile app that combines user-generated health data and lab results to give you a holistic view of your heart health. Our app offers personalized guidance and rewards for healthy behaviors, and lets you book home blood tests with ease. Download now!

Hope these ad copy ideas help you get started. Let me know if you need further assistance or have any questions.
